# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: default
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-allow-all
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from: []
  egress:
    - to: []
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  selector: {}
  action: ALLOW
  policy:
    - from: []
    - to: []
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  selector: {}
  action: ALLOW
  policy:
    - from: []
    - to: []
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: linkerd-policy-webhook
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: linkerd-policy-webhook
rules:
  - apiGroups: ["security.linkerd.io"]
    resources: ["authorizationpolicies", "serverauthorizationpolicies"]
    verbs: ["create", "update", "delete", "patch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: linkerd-policy-webhook
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: linkerd-policy-webhook
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: linkerd-policy-webhook
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
